reviews.review_description: I can play the game, when is loaded the game out me to coulis main.

Using Samsung galaxy s9 plus, vr gear. Installed then it said it had an update. (6 times) finally restarted my phone. Tried to play. Got to start lobby, pressed start. It would load slowly up to 9 or 10 percent, then speed to 100 percent. After that, crashes and goes back to oculus menu.
I wanted to play but the wolf said, no!
I love the game, but I would really love to have a save function. Then I'd be able to go in it and not get tired of having to restart the game over and over and over again.
Why no save?

reviews.review_title: Concept is good, but made me sick
reviews.review_description: Good idea for a app, but the rendering is jumpy, and with the type of graphics, I couldn't stay out the app long. Love to try it again when updated.
I couldn't do anything but look around. I followed the instructions but none of it responded to me pressing the buttons. Looks nice though.
Kind of a copy of mine craft and sandbox games. No controller support though..  These games are best played with controller
Finaly a survival game on vr, this game has so much potential. Whish they add controller support so i dont have to have my hand raised all the time and make a save option as well.
Love it but needs more functionality and random worlds

I honestly love this game.... But..... audio lags a bit, and there is no save function. And for such a simplistic world, the drawn distance is too short. Fix bugs, add save feature, and I'll give 5 stars.

the concept is really good but it has a ton of bugs an you can't save your worlds... sometimes i can't click anything in the in-game menu so i can't open the backpack and craft stuff but overall it's a great game
I get the idea of the game but the game itself is not really worth being played. Not even good graphics or gameplay.
Only worked properly for me once.

Love self survival idea, started playing, collecting and exploring but darn wolf gets me every time, before I can even find or make a weapon...if that's an option, I wouldn't know cuz I can't get that far and would like to pursue this game further. Reading other comments, a save feature in my opinion would be very important, if I can't save my progress I probably won't waste any more time on it.

This game is so promising and I hope it gets fixed soon!. For some reason after so long you can not open your back pack and if you can't open it, then you can't do anything. Please fix...I so want to play this game! The idea is awesome and I love the idea.
It is a cool game and I love to play it, but you can't we save, and if you die, you have to quit the game and relaunch it or else you backpack on menu won't open the second time, please fix this

Here’s the thing I had a great game on it thought I knew where not to go because it spawns the wolf, had almost everything but the sword. Didn’t play for a while and now regardless of what area I go to the wolf spawns on day 1 or 2 and it’s bull lol.
It would be a lot better with gamepad integration as well as a tutorial on the game play otherwise good game and I'm looking forward to any updates in the future
Die cause you can't swim?
